item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "root='longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
printf 'TREE\\n'
find \""'$root" -mindepth 1 -print | sort
printf '"'FILES_WITH_SIZE\\n'
find \""'$root" -type f -exec stat -f '"'%N\\t%z bytes' {} \\; | sort
printf 'STALE_OR_PLANNING_MATCHES\\n'
set +e
rg -n -i --hidden -e 'big_bang' -e 'big-bang' -e 'todo' -e 'tbd' -e 'draft' -e 'planning note' -e 'historical option' \""'$root"
scan_exit=$?
printf '"'SCAN_EXIT_STATUS=%d\\n' \""'$scan_exit"
exit 0'
